programme.title: Quincy ME
programme.desc: A man confesses to murder, thinking he has killed his boss, but the sleuthing medical examiner believes he is innocent and tries to get him off the hook(n)

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: The lure of easy money beckons once again as Terry and Arthur appreciate the commercial possibilities of cheap tobacco, but it is not long before the would-be smugglers are all at sea. Comedy, starring George Cole, Dennis Waterman and Ray Winstone(n)

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: A £30,000 consignment of mercury is stolen and the squad is bemused when the prime suspect comes up with a cast-iron alibi - he was in the company of his 'mistress' hours before his planned wedding ceremony. Diana Dors guest stars in the crime drama, alongside John Thaw and Dennis Waterman(n)

programme.title: The Professionals
programme.desc: Bodie and Doyle are asked to keep a surveillance on Cowley after evidence suggests he has stolen two canisters of a lethal nerve gas and begun negotiating with an unfriendly foreign power. The plot thickens when they trace their boss to a country mansion, where after they are caught he denies knowing them(n)

programme.title: The Saint
programme.desc: Simon Templar becomes the target of a paid assassin and has to whittle down a list of potential avengers to find out who wants him killed. Time appears to not be on his side after a female journalist friend is abducted. Roger Moore stars, with Suzanne Lloyd(n)

programme.title: Kojak
programme.desc: Part two of two. Chinese gangsters kidnap an ailing Italian mobster in retribution for being disregarded by the city's other crime syndicates, and demand a $2million ransom(n)

programme.title: Quincy ME
programme.desc: An apparently open-and-shut homicide case looks like an easy day's work for Quincy, until he receives a request from an old friend pleading for his help(n)

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: Arthur is repaid a debt in dodgy £20 notes, but by the time it comes to light they are counterfeit his creditor is heading on a flight to India. Once the Winchester is pinpointed as the source of the forged currency, Arthur also finds he has Chisholm breathing down his neck. Robbie Coltrane and Art Malik guest star, with George Cole and Patrick Malahide(n)

programme.title: The Professionals
programme.desc: CI5 is faced with a terrifying campaign of explosions and assassinations, apparently committed by an opposing operative that Cowley is convinced he killed several years earlier. It appears that he is either mistaken or an old associate of his former adversary is seeking revenge. Gordon Jackson stars(n)

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: A Scottish detective on the trail of a gang of crooks requests help, and the squad resolves to catch his quarry. However, it becomes apparent that the visiting sleuth is holding back some important information that Regan and his colleagues need to know. TV presenter Janet Ellis features in a supporting role(n)

programme.title: The Chase
programme.desc: Bradley Walsh presents as four contestants pit their wits against ruthless quiz genius the Chaser in the hope of winning a potential prize pot worth thousands of pounds. They work as a team and play strategically to answer general knowledge questions against the clock and race down the game board to the exit without being caught(n)

programme.title: The Chase Celebrity Special
programme.desc: Bradley Walsh presents as impressionist Rory Bremner, weather reporter Laura Tobin, Dragons' Den's Deborah Meaden and TV gardener and chat show host Alan Titchmarsh pit their wits against ruthless quiz genius the Chaser in the hope of winning a potential prize pot worth thousands of pounds. They must work as a team and play strategically to answer general knowledge questions against the clock and race down the game board to the exit without being caught(n)

programme.title: Junk and Disorderly
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Sam Lovegrove visit an emporium full of trinketry, and look to make a profit at one of their favourite autojumbles(n)

programme.title: Death Race (2008)
programme.desc: Jensen Ames is framed for the murder of his wife and sent to Terminal Island Prison, a facility that broadcasts the highly profitable Death Race, a high-octane event where convicts battle to the death in customised cars. When a popular driver dies, crooked prison warden Hennessey persuades Ames to take his place, claiming he will be released if he is victorious. Sci-fi thriller, starring Jason Statham, Joan Allen, Ian McShane and Tyrese Gibson(n)

Robbie Coltrane and Art Malik guest star, with George Cole and Patrick Malahide(n)

programme.desc: Ed Chamberlin presents coverage of day one of the November Meeting, including the 3.00 Glenfarclas Cross Country Handicap Steeple Chase, plus races at 1.50, 2.25 and 3.35. programme.title: The Car Chasers

programme.title: Football's Greatest: Johan Cruyff
programme.desc: A profile of the former football player and manager, who played and managed Ajax and Barcelona, and represented the Netherlands on 48 occasions, scoring 33 goals(n)

programme.title: The Professionals
programme.desc: Bodie and Doyle are pitted against KGB assassins when a CI5 operative is apparently raised from the dead. A proposed exchange finds Cowley at a deserted aerodrome, and a burst of gunfire apparently leaves his life on the line. Martin Shaw, Lewis Collins and Gordon Jackson star(n)

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: Regan and Carter track down those responsible for killing a driver and injuring a policeman while making off with vehicles carrying brandy on two separate occasions. Carter's new girlfriend, rookie cop Julie Kingdom, pursues a known fence and recovers the brandy. However, when Regan wants to take the credit, he and Carter come to blows. John Thaw and Dennis Waterman star(n)

programme.title: The Chase
programme.desc: Bradley Walsh presents as four contestants pit their wits against ruthless quiz genius the Chaser in the hope of winning a potential prize pot worth thousands of pounds. They work as a team and play strategically to answer general knowledge questions against the clock and race down the game board to the exit without being caught(n)

programme.title: River Monsters
programme.desc: Extreme angler Jeremy Wade responds to reports from one of the US east coast's most popular vacation destinations, the sunny Florida Keys. A creature is attacking both visitors and locals alike, striking its victims so violently it is slicing open flesh and even smashing bones, and the assaults are happening both above and below the water. Jeremy is determined to discover the identity of the assailant and uncover what is triggering these attacks. He knows it is not going to be easy, and it is not long before the intrepid marine biologist fears he may be out of his depth(n)

programme.title: US Marshals (1998)
programme.desc: A federal marshal sets out in pursuit of an escaped prisoner who is determined to prove his murder conviction was false. As the chase progresses, the marshal is forced to work with a diplomatic security agent, making him realise the fugitive is no ordinary convict and that his claims of innocence may be true. Thriller sequel, starring Tommy Lee Jones reprising his Oscar-winning role from The Fugitive, alongside Wesley Snipes and Robert Downey Jr(n)

programme.title: Benidorm
programme.desc: Monty is in need of a new job after being sacked by Joyce, and has to decide whether to swallow his pride and go to Sir Henry, or see if Mr Wu has a fitting position for him. Meanwhile, Loretta and Eddie make secret plans for an anniversary party for Billy and Sheron back in the UK, but it looks as if the couple are making plans of their own. Elsewhere, things are not going well for Kenneth as he wakes up in Blow & Go after a big night out, only to realise that the builders have inadvertently bricked him in(n)

programme.title: Ronin (1998)
programme.desc: A freelance former US intelligence agent is recruited alongside a team of fellow mercenaries to take part in an international plot to capture a briefcase from a gang of criminals. However, after the mission is completed, one member of the crew decides to betray his equally ruthless comrades-in-arms - with inevitably explosive results. John Frankenheimer's action thriller, starring Robert De Niro, Jean Reno, Natascha McElhone, Sean Bean, Stellan Skarsgard and Jonathan Pryce(n)

Finally it's Nickie and Austen's turn to impress with their 'sloppy but tasty' grub. As the contest hots up, the hosts get a dose of their own medicine when their diners return the criticism they've dished out all week(n)

programme.title: A New Life in the Sun
programme.desc: As the summer comes to an end, decision time arrives for the expat businesses abroad. A couple from Buckinghamshire find out if their new French cooking school has hit the right note, while two Essex boys finally open their Spanish bar(n)

programme.title: Countdown

programme.title: A Place in the Sun

Glenys has been searching for the perfect location for several years, but when she visited La Mata, she knew it was the right place for her. With a budget of £140,000, she's ready to make her dream a reality, but it's a big decision so she's bringing friend Martine along for support(n)

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau: DIY
programme.desc: The Strawbridge family heads to the beaches of Saint-Malo with Angel's parents to seek out chateau inspiration. Ithaca and Alex's fundraiser in northern France is a logistical nightmare, but becomes a hot ticket. First impressions are important to Angela and Steve, who get stuck in a last-minute fix as they try to restore their chateau's electric gates before the first rental guests of the season arrive(n)

programme.title: Junior Bake Off
programme.desc: It's Pastry Day for the Heat B bakers and their last chance to win a place in Finals week. Judge Liam's Charles' technical challenge is an unusual hybrid requiring the bakers to demonstrate knowledge and techniques worthy of an advanced pastry chef. Then the bakers are tasked with creating a showstopper in the form of savoury hand pies. Hosted by Harry Hill(n)

programme.title: The Simpsons

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: Ste becomes aware of the tension building between Jonny and Stuart, and Darren prepares for Luke to spend the day with DJ(n)

programme.title: Channel 4 News
programme.desc: Including sport and weather(n)

programme.title: Unreported World
programme.desc: Reporter Adnan Sarwar meets the pupils, parents and teachers trying to survive at a primary school caught in a turf war in Cape Town, South Africa, between lawless, drug-dealing gangs. As Sarwar and his director Tom Cross discover, the Cape Flats have long had a notorious reputation for lawlessness and violence, but with 279 children killed in the last year alone, the government has now sent in the military. However, it's done little to stop the daily shootings, with those carrying guns seemingly getting younger and younger(n)

programme.title: Flirty Dancing
programme.desc: Although a big romcom fan, Emmerson has had his heart broken in the past and finds it hard to trust. He is matched with 28-year-old Ruby, whose dreams of becoming a professional ballet dancer were shattered when she had to have both hips replaced. Ashley Banjo creates a dance with a challenging drop that relies on trusting each other from the very first moment they meet. He also assists property manager Garry, who finds it hard to talk to men he fancies. Ashley's energetic, playful routine gives him and Ryan - who has never had a boyfriend before - the opportunity to put themselves 'out there'(n)

programme.title: Gogglebox

Meanwhile, Jean-Christophe Novelli and Aldo Zilli are reunited(n)

programme.title: She's Funny That Way (2014)

Comedy, starring Owen Wilson, Jennifer Aniston, Imogen Poots and Joanna Lumley(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In north Surrey, planning enforcement officer Becky is joined by singing teacher Petrina, drum teacher Rob, solicitor Shoba and building company boss Giovanni. Becky plans to delight her guests with an evening of modern home-cooking and a menu including butternut, lamb and a deconstructed apple dessert. The week gets off to an intriguing start with young gun Rob taking a shine to Petrina and vice versa(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Solicitor Shoba hosts the second night in north Surrey, and tries to impress with an Indian-themed menu. However, the guests are less than impressed with the food, especially the main course - a curry made from frozen fish - but will a bit of belly dancing, Bollywood-style, help save the day? Meanwhile, singer Petrina and drummer Rob continue their flirting both at and away from the table(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me

As a single man living in his stepmother's house, Rob thinks his competitors will see him as an underdog, so is intent on pulling out all the stops(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me

Will tonight be the night, or will he shy away when he discovers Petrina has sung in the West End and worked with dozens of household names?(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me

However, poor food doesn't deter a romantic Rob from popping the question to Petrina, sending shockwaves across the dining room. programme.title: Time Team

The archaeologists have only three days to determine the size of the lost community and search for evidence of the battles between the locals and the Anglo-Norman settlers(n)

programme.title: The Normans
programme.desc: Professor Robert Bartlett examines the Normans' expansion toward southern Europe and the Middle East in the 11th century. Southern Italy and Sicily were conquered and a prosperous kingdom flourished on the island, which became an important centre of medieval culture and an example of harmony between religions. However, Pope Urban II's call for holy war against the Muslims, to win Jerusalem back, led to the Normans embarking on the First Crusade(n)

programme.title: The Normans
programme.desc: Historian Stephen Baxter explores his own theory that the Domesday Book was commissioned to confer revolutionary powers on the monarchy in the 11th century, and not intended as a means to collect taxes. He examines how the first great national survey, which recorded who owned every piece of land and property in England, was a massive logistical exercise that documented the traumatic impact of the Norman Conquest(n)

programme.title: Time Team
programme.desc: Tony Robinson and the team head to Somerset, where a family of farmers hopes to unearth evidence of a Norman castle believed to have once stood on top of what is known locally as Castle Hill. Records show there used to be such a structure in the area, but there are several likely locations for it. As the dig progresses, an outline of what appears to be a castle keep is revealed, but the findings lead to an unexpected conclusion(n)

programme.title: Auschwitz: The Nazis and the Final Solution
programme.desc: The history of the concentration camp, charting its origins as a place to hold political prisoners through its development into a mechanised factory for mass murder. programme.title: Planet Earth
programme.desc: The wildlife on the great plains of Africa, Asia, North America and the Arctic, which cover a quarter of the land on Earth. The distinctive Tibetan fox is captured on film for the first time, while a herd of caribou migrates 2,000 miles across the tundra in search of grass. Night vision equipment tracks a pride of 30 lions hunting elephants in the tropical African savannah near one of the region's few remaining waterholes. Presented by David Attenborough(n)

programme.title: Planet Earth
programme.desc: An insight into woodlands around the world, from the stunted conifers cloaked in snow and ice in the Arctic forests, to the broadleaf woods in North America and Europe. Also featured are the 100m-high giant redwoods of California, as well as Madagascar's unusual upside-down trees, which store water in their swollen trunks and harbour strange wildlife. Presented by David Attenborough(n)

programme.desc: Laurence Rees looks at how Hitler formed a connection with millions of Germans and generated a level of charismatic attraction almost without parallel in the process. With testimonies from those who lived during the era, archive film and specially shot documentary footage(n)

programme.title: Worlds Apart with Oksana Boyko
programme.desc: Worlds Apart is a fast-paced, in-depth discussion on the pressing issues of the day. The host Oksana Boyko strives to depart from the traditional Q-and-A form of interview in favor of an emotive and engaging conversation. While the title and format of the program presuppose differences of opinion, WA's main goal is to facilitate public debate in an intelligent and respectful manner(n)

programme.title: Dogs with Extraordinary Jobs
programme.desc: Looking at how a Sprocker spaniel's sense of smell and the protective instincts of an Anatolian shepherd dog are playing a vital role in the conservation of endangered species. Plus, a couple of canine colleagues who protect aircraft from potentially dangerous bird strikes during take-off and landing. Using their natural speed, stamina and desire to chase, the pair works at King Shaka Airport in Durban, South Africa, responding to emergency call-outs from air-traffic control(n)

programme.title: How to Lose a Stone in a Month
programme.desc: Ruth Langsford invites four more people to test some of the world's most extreme weight-loss programmes, under the supervision of GP Dr Amir Khan of GPs: Behind Closed Doors fame. Those taking part include food fanatic Hannah, who thinks nothing of filling up on chocolate spread straight from the jar, student Simon, who has kept going throughout his dissertation with the help of custard creams, sugary teas and carb-heavy rice dishes, and Olivia, who tops up with secret bedtime snacks(n)

programme.title: M&S vs Waitrose: Which Is Better Value?
programme.desc: Documentary examining the ongoing rivalry between the supermarkets. Marks & Spencer has always had a special place in the nation's heart, with almost 1,000 stores and a reputation for quality stretching back 135 years. But Waitrose has proved a fierce rival. However, both stores face tough challenges in the future, not least from online retailers. Which of the two is best equipped to weather the high-street storm?(n)

programme.title: Good Girls' Guide to Kinky Sex
programme.desc: Three self-confessed 'good girls' and their partners - held back by a fear of being adventurous in the bedroom - look for creative ways to improve their sex lives. Over the course of six weeks, each couple will attempt 18 kinky sex challenges they have never tried before, from food play and dressing up to vibrators and handcuffs, to see if they will be inspired(n)

programme.title: Gypsy Kids: Our Secret World
programme.desc: Twelve-year-old Romany gypsy Ben has been bullied at school as long as he can remember. Not to be held back, he has dreams of becoming a pilot, and funds his £150 lessons himself by selling eggs to the local cafe. But can he obtain his qualifications with so many interruptions to his education? Four-year-old Rudy watches his dad, professional cage fighter Tony, for the first time, and Irish traveller friends Alivia and Alicia face eviction for the second time this year(n)

programme.title: In Therapy
programme.desc: The TV personality and singer undergoes psychological evaluations with leading UK therapist Mandy Saligari over a number of intensive sessions. Now 50 and married to her second husband Ray Fensome, Coleen is at a crossroads - struggling with self-esteem and her relationship with Ray. Mandy explores the true impact of an entire lifetime spent in the media spotlight, one which has seen dramatic revelations of domestic and sexual abuse, alcoholism, infidelity, divorce, the death of Coleen's closest sister, and a dramatic and very well-publicised family feud(n)

programme.title: The Gadget Show
programme.desc: Craig Charles and the team celebrate the 400th edition of the technology programme, with Georgie Barrat building a birthday cake out of smartphones and 3D-printed buttercream. Jon Bentley heads to Paris to put the latest sat-nav devices through their paces, while Ortis Deley compares tech available when the show began in 2004 with the Apple iPhone 11. For the grand finale, the presenters embark on a mission to reclaim a world record they once held - for the longest jump by a remote-controlled car(n)

programme.title: The World's Most Scenic Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Bill Nighy narrates a trip through Wales' highest peaks and deepest valleys. Starting in Pwllheli in the north west, the route heads along the lines that were built during the slate industry's heyday. At Porthmadog, the journey briefly switches to the reconstructed steam trains of the Welsh Highland National Heritage Railway to Minffordd station. Nearby is the village of Portmeirion, famous for its role in the classic TV series The Prisoner. Rejoining the Cambrian Line, local farmers reveal what the railway means to them, before the route takes in the seaside resort of Aberdovey(n)

programme.title: Great British Ships
programme.desc: The Mayflower transported the first English Puritans from Plymouth to the New World in 1620. The Pilgrims and the ship's crew crew overcame almost impossible odds to establish a colony, which ultimately gave birth to the United States of America. Taking to the waters off the New England coast, Rob Bell recounts the dramatic story of the Mayflower's 66-day crossing, as she endured high seas and monstrous storms. In Mystic,Connecticut, Rob explores a full-sized replica of the Mayflower and in Plymouth, Massachusetts, unfolds the story of the ship's arrival in the New World(n)

programme.title: Cannibals & Killers: Inside Russia's Toughest Prisons
programme.desc: Documentary offering a never-before seen look inside three high-security Russian prisons. Cameras go inside Europe's oldest operating jail, Vladimir Central, Russia's largest prison with more than 1,200 inmates, and one of its convicts opens up about killing his brother-in-law for disturbing his daughter's sleep. Cameras also explore the Black Dolphin prison, near the Kazakhstan border, which is home to some of the highest category offenders in the world, and a frozen Siberian prison camp, where two inmates go their separate ways as one gets parole, while the other does not(n)

programme.title: The Rock (1996)
programme.desc: A renegade general and his crack team of mercenaries take over the abandoned fortress prison of Alcatraz and threaten San Francisco with toxic nerve-gas rockets to extort a massive ransom. To break their stranglehold on the city, the FBI sends in a chemical weapons expert and a jailed SAS veteran, chosen because he is the only man to have ever escaped from the infamous penitentiary. Action thriller, with Sean Connery, Nicolas Cage and Ed Harris(n)

programme.title: Live Boxing
programme.desc: Alex Dilmaghani v Francisco Fonseca. Coverage of the bout for the vacant WBA International Super Featherweight title at York Hall in London. This contest was called off at the last minute in September when Fonseca was advised by a doctor to withdraw. Kent's Dilmaghani is looking to claim the first title of his professional career and extend his 15-fight winning streak with a victory against the Nicaraguan, who has a creditable record of 25 wins, two defeats and one draw, but is fighting outside of North America for the first time. With commentary by Dave Farrar and Richie Woodhall(n)

programme.title: Greatest Sci-Fi Movies
programme.desc: Sci-fi has launched some of cinema's greatest directors and become one of the most pioneering, profitable and popular movie genres. This documentary pays tribute to the moments and the characters that have defined the genre, recalling some of the more memorable out-of-this-world film scenes and including insightful anecdotes from those directly involved, and comments from celebrities, critics and fans(n)

programme.title: The Great Sioux Massacre (1965)
programme.desc: A corrupt senator coaxes Colonel Custer out of retirement with the prospect of presidential office, and the soldier tries to further his political ambitions by wresting control of the current military campaign from its commanding officer, culminating in his last stand at the Battle of the Little Bighorn. Western, with Philip Carey, Joseph Cotten, Darren McGavin and Julie Sommars(n)

programme.title: The Way to the Stars (1945)
programme.desc: A naive young pilot is assigned to a British bomber base during the Second World War, and is involved in the opening skirmishes of the Battle of Britain. He encounters the first wave of American recruits to the Allies, and falls for a local girl - but when his squadron leader is killed leaving a wife and child behind, he questions whether he can afford to marry. Drama, starring John Mills and Michael Redgrave(n)

programme.title: The Charge of the Light Brigade (1968)
programme.desc: Historical drama set during the Crimean War, in which British military commanders order a disastrous attack on Russian gun positions, causing the needless slaughter of hundreds of cavalrymen. Starring David Hemmings, Vanessa Redgrave, John Gielgud, Trevor Howard and Harry Andrews(n)

programme.title: The Hunger Games: Catching Fire (2013)
programme.desc: Katniss Everdeen's victory in a televised death match makes her a focus for revolution against the totalitarian nation she lives in. The rulers of the regime plot to crush dissent with a new series of games, in which past champions battle it out. Sci-fi adventure sequel based on the second book in Suzanne Collins' trilogy of novels, starring Jennifer Lawrence, Liam Hemsworth, Donald Sutherland and Philip Seymour Hoffman(n)

programme.title: Star Trek Into Darkness Interview Special
programme.desc: Director JJ Abrams discusses making the second instalment in the sci-fi series(n)

programme.title: Star Trek Into Darkness (2013)
programme.desc: Captain Kirk and the crew of the starship Enterprise are sent on a clandestine mission into enemy territory to track down the rogue Starfleet agent behind a terrorist attack on Earth. However, the assignment brings to light a hidden threat from within their own organisation. Sci-fi adventure sequel, starring Chris Pine, Zachary Quinto and Benedict Cumberbatch(n)

programme.title: Dawn of the Planet of the Apes (2014)
programme.desc: A colony of super-intelligent apes thrives following a global virus outbreak that wipes out much of the human race. A survivor tries to make peace with the leader of the apes, but their efforts to reach an understanding are threatened by warmongers on both sides. Sci-fi thriller sequel, starring Andy Serkis, Jason Clarke and Gary Oldman(n)

programme.title: The Bay (2012)
programme.desc: A reporter survives an ecological catastrophe that struck a coastal town, killing hundreds of people in just 24 hours. The authorities have covered up the cause of the disaster, so she gathers together all the video footage in existence from that fateful day on a mission to expose the truth. Thriller, starring Kether Donohue and Kristen Connolly(n)

programme.title: Elephant Walk (1954)
programme.desc: A woman struggles to come to terms with her tea plantation owner husband's obsession with his dead father. Melodrama, starring Elizabeth Taylor, Peter Finch, Dana Andrews and Abraham Sofaer(n)

programme.title: The Last Command (1955)
programme.desc: Adventurer Jim Bowie returns to Texas during the 1830s and tries to quell the simmering antagonism between settlers and the Mexican government. However, as the Mexican army's aggression intensifies, he is forced to take up arms and fight in the historic battle at the Alamo. Western, starring Sterling Hayden, Arthur Hunnicutt, Anna Maria Alberghetti and Richard Carlson(n)

programme.title: Dark Command (1940)
programme.desc: A teacher is defeated in his ambition to become the marshal of his town during the early years of the American Civil War, so he turns renegade instead. Before long he has a reputation as a feared raider fighting on the side of the South, and it falls to the newly appointed lawman whose job he coveted to stop his reign of terror. Western, starring John Wayne and Walter Pidgeon(n)

programme.title: Funeral in Berlin (1966)
programme.desc: Former crook and disreputable spy Harry Palmer has to carefully engineer the defection of a Russian officer responsible for safeguarding vital military secrets - but the mission proves less than straightforward. Cold War thriller and the second film to feature Len Deighton's character, starring Michael Caine, Eva Renzi, Oscar Homolka, Paul Hubschmid and Guy Doleman(n)

programme.title: Table 19 (2017)

programme.title: A Million Ways to Die in the West (2014)
programme.desc: A timid farmer abandoned by his girlfriend is fascinated by a mysterious woman who rides into his frontier town. He tries to act the part of a gunslinging Wild West hero to impress her, only to find himself facing a showdown with her notorious outlaw husband. Western spoof, directed by and starring Seth MacFarlane, with Charlize Theron and Liam Neeson(n)

programme.title: Dredd (2012)
programme.desc: An uncompromising law enforcer in a post-apocalyptic city is assigned to train a psychic new recruit. A report of three murders leads them to a tower block dominated by a ruthless drug lord, only for the gangster to seal off the building, forcing them to fight their way out. Sci-fi thriller based on the 2000AD comic-strip, starring Karl Urban, Lena Headey and Olivia Thirlby(n)

programme.title: RoboCop (2014)
programme.desc: A corporation that creates military robots seizes a chance to diversify into law enforcement when a Detroit cop is critically injured in a bombing. He is rebuilt as a crime-fighting cyborg, but struggles to regain his free will from his creators' control. Sci-fi thriller remake, starring Joel Kinnaman, Gary Oldman, Michael Keaton and Samuel L Jackson(n)

programme.title: White Christmas (1954)
programme.desc: A pair of former soldiers start a new career as nightclub entertainers. They try to boost the popularity of their old commanding officer's struggling winter resort in Vermont by staging a series of extravagant shows, with a little help from their former army buddies and a talented singing sister act. Musical, starring Bing Crosby, Danny Kaye, Vera-Ellen, Dean Jagger, Sig Rumann, Mary Wickes, Anne Whitfield and Rosemary Clooney, featuring seasonal songs by Irving Berlin(n)

programme.title: Diary of a Wimpy Kid: Dog Days (2012)
programme.desc: Weedy youngster Greg finds his plans for a lazy school holiday ruined when his mother bans video games and his father organises a series of family activities. When he finds out a girl he likes is working at a country club, he tells his family he has a summer job there as an excuse to spend time with her - but struggles to keep up the deception. Family comedy sequel, starring Zachary Gordon and Steve Zahn(n)

programme.title: Ice Age (2002)
programme.desc: Three mismatched prehistoric animals join forces to return a human infant to its tribe - but as their journey unfolds, the creatures fail to anticipate the many perils and pitfalls that lay in store for them. Animated adventure, featuring the voices of John Leguizamo, Ray Romano, Denis Leary, Goran Visnjic and Jack Black(n)

programme.title: Baggage Claim (2013)
programme.desc: An air hostess is horrified at the thought of her younger sister getting married while she is still single. She realises her job gives her access to eligible men from across America, and begins clocking up thousands of air miles as she scours the country for a potential fiance. Romantic comedy, with Paula Patton and Taye Diggs(n)

programme.title: GI Joe: The Rise of Cobra (2009)
programme.desc: When a powerful experimental weapon is snatched by a mysterious terrorist organisation, two of the soldiers guarding it are recruited into a top-secret military strike force. As they go in search of the stolen technology, they uncover a plot by its creator to take over the world. Action adventure, with Channing Tatum, Sienna Miller and Christopher Eccleston(n)

programme.title: Kingsman: The Secret Service (2015)
programme.desc: A streetwise teenager is taken under the wing of his dead father's old colleague, an agent working for a super-secret spy organisation. Will the youngster prove to be a chip off the old block by proving useful during a battle against a twisted, hi-tech genius? Action comedy based on a comic book, starring Colin Firth, Taron Egerton and Samuel L Jackson(n)

programme.title: American Fable (2016)
programme.desc: When 11-year-old Gitty discovers that her beloved father is hiding a wealthy man in her family's silo in order to save their struggling farm, she is forced to choose between saving the man's life or protecting her family from the consequences of their actions. Thriller, starring Peyton Kennedy, Richard Schiff and Kip Pardue(n)
